subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — I'd be happy to set up a meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available time slots on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information. You can find general information about our leadership team on our public website. I'd be happy to help facilitate an introduction through the appropriate channels once we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
